holdings.infoBox: AMEI is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 11.64%, Eli Lilly and Company at 10.30%, Us Dollars at 7.92%, Rockwell Automation at 5.69%, and Microsoft at 5.17%.

overview.description: The Amana Equity Income ETF (AMEI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of dividend-paying stocks globally, of companies considered to be compliant with Islamic principles. The ETF seeks to provide current income. AMEI was launched on Jun 24, 2026 and is issued by Amana.
